summary.zh: Apple 將在 6 月 9 日凌晨舉行線上發表會，預期帶來新一代系統與 Apple Intelligence 更新。
summary.en: Apple will host its online event on June 9, with new platform updates and Apple Intelligence news expected.

summary.zh: Apple 正把智慧功能整合到更多系統體驗中，讓裝置能更理解使用者的日常需求。
summary.en: Apple is integrating intelligence features deeper across its platforms to better support everyday workflows.

title.zh: OpenAI 推動 AI 工具日常化
title.en: OpenAI Brings AI Tools Into Daily Work

summary.zh: AI 工具正在從聊天介面走向影片、搜尋與生產力工作流程，成為科技新聞的重要焦點。
summary.en: AI tools are expanding beyond chat into video, search, and productivity workflows.
